creator: de-freebsd@ctseuro.com
text:
Yesterday i updated to nginx-1.12.2_10,2 and my Rails Passenger apps no longer work. Error message at 'service nginx start': nginx: [alert] Unable to start the Phusion Passenger watchdog: it seems to have crashed during startup for an unknown reason, with exit code 1 (-1: Unknown error)

Reverting to 1.12.2_7,2 worked for me.

I suspect the update of the passenger module to 5.2 breaks the still-in-ports www/rubygem-passenger-5.1.12 version or vice-versa.
